title: cynanchum papillatum
intro: Cynanchum papillatum, also known as the hairy milkvine or white milkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dogbane family (Apocynaceae). This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which have been shown to have medicinal value in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cynanchum papillatum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and anti-diabetic activities. In traditional herbal medicine, Cynanchum papillatum is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and extracts for various health benefits.
